items.title: BuildFast raises $25M Series B for AI agent platform
items.contentSnippet: BuildFast Inc announced a $25M Series B round led by Sequoia Capital to expand its AI agent development platform.
items.creator: TechCrunch

items.title: DeFi Labs launches concentrated liquidity pools on Arbitrum
items.contentSnippet: DeFi Labs has expanded its decentralized exchange to Arbitrum with a new concentrated liquidity feature.
items.creator: The Block

items.title: New AI safety startup emerges from stealth with $5M seed
items.contentSnippet: A new AI safety startup has emerged from stealth mode, securing $5M in seed funding to develop alignment research tools.
items.creator: VentureBeat

items.title: Chain Core announces ZK bridge audit completion
items.contentSnippet: Chain Core's cross-chain bridge has completed its third-party security audit, paving the way for mainnet launch.
items.creator: CoinDesk
